data.body: ROUND 2 reviews: STORY A a3d7 re-review PASS + CERTIFIED attestation (verify-signature exit 0) — claimable now. STORY F ff6f fresh review BLOCK (6 findings, all real data-contract mismatches): (1)+(6) convergence line-graph polylines are per-DECISION-SERIES not per-round, and sidecar has up to 5 buckets (blocking/advisory/overflow/indeterminate/dropped) — must define 4 rendered series (merge overflow into advisory); (2)+(4) per-round 'timestamp' trust signal has NO landed source (all_review_results returns only event['data'], drops envelope ts) and modifying read layer is epic-1's scope — must drop per-round timestamp; (3) 'certified' badge: plan-review signing is TICKET-level attestation not per-round — show one ticket-level indicator, not per-round; (5) completion FAIL sidecar (completion_verifier_fail_v1) has NO criteria[] (findings-only) — need fallback rendering path. PLAN: claim+implement story A (TDD) while remediating story F plan + re-reviewing in bg.
